title: wp-env-bin Config
description: Site configuration for the wp-env-bin local WordPress development tool.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON Schema file for this config.

pluginName.description: Plugin or theme name displayed in CLI output.

projectType.description: Whether this project is a plugin or theme. Determines how .wp-env.json is generated.

siteType.description: WordPress site type. Use 'multisite' when syncing from a Multisite network. Defaults to 'singlesite'.

host.description: Remote host type. Determines which CLI tool is used for remote WP-CLI calls. Defaults to 'pantheon' (Terminus). Use 'ssh' for generic SSH access via WP-CLI, or 'wpvip' for WordPress VIP (VIP-CLI).

env.description: Remote environment identifier. Format depends on host type: pantheon → 'site.environment' (e.g. 'mysite.live'), wpvip → 'app.environment' (e.g. 'myapp.production'), ssh → WP-CLI SSH connection string (e.g. 'user@hostname/var/www/html'). Required when using the 'db get' or 'composer get' commands.

url.description: Live site domain (e.g. 'example.com'). Used for URL replacement during DB sync and .htaccess media proxy rules.

oldPrefix.description: Database table prefix on the live site (e.g. 'wpsites_1440_'). Required for multisite — tables are renamed to 'wp_' locally.

siteId.description: WordPress multisite site/blog ID (e.g. '1440'). Required for multisite .htaccess media proxy path generation.

adminUsername.description: Local WordPress admin username to create or reset after a DB sync. Defaults to 'admin'.

adminEmail.description: Local WordPress admin email address. Defaults to 'admin@localhost.com'.

adminPassword.description: Local WordPress admin password. Defaults to 'password'.

composerPath.description: Path to the remote server's composer.json (e.g. '/code/composer.json'). Used by the 'config composer' command to map installed plugins.

test-paths.description: URL paths used for visual regression testing with the 'compare' command.
